content:
⭐**预售时间：**2025/11/30 14:00
⭐**购买方式：**开售后，淘宝搜索“灵犀互娱官方旗舰店”即可前往购买！
⭐**产品内容：**全系列包含54款徽章（包含52位唤醒体+守密人西维斯特与莉奥诺拉），每个款式均分为“普通版”和“稀有版”两种。
⭐**售卖方式：**
✦ 任意单款徽章
✦ 随机5款徽章盲盒（不重复），盲盒中必定包含1个随机款式的“稀有版”徽章
✦ 全款式典藏礼盒（全款普通版各1，不包含稀有版 ）

🎁**互动有奖：**
✦ 评论区留言即可参与抽奖，截止时间2025/12/8  23:59。
✦ 我们将在留言的守密人中，抽5位送出「秘银日冕」系列徽章盲盒×1。
✦ 中奖名单将在转发活动结束后72小时内公布，届时请留意官方动态和私信消息。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

⭐**Pre-sale time:** <t:1764482400:F> 
⭐**Available in our official store at: **https://tinyurl.com/MORIMENSSHOP
⭐There are 54 designs in total, including 52 Awakeners + the Keepers: Sylvester & Leonora.
Each design comes in a Standard Edition and a Rare Edition.
⭐**Available Formats: **
✦Individual Badges; 
✦5-Badge Random Blind Box (not repeated) ，Each Blind Box is guaranteed to include 1 Rare Edition badge.
✦Full Set Collector's Box (1 for each regular version, excluding rare versions).


🎁 **Giveaway**
✦ How to Enter: comment under this post.
✦ Entry Deadline: <t:1765209599:F>
✦ Prize: We will select 5 winners from those who commented under this post to receive a "Silver Corona" Blind Box ×1.
✦ Winners will be announced within 72 hours after the deadline. Please stay tuned to further annoucements and DMs from the official account.

@everyone
thread_title: 抽奖！「秘银日冕」系列徽章 即将贩售！"Silver Corona" Awakener Badges Launching Soon! Share for Merchandise Giveaway!
